requirements.description: The hero section shall display the tagline "Build Smarter. Evolve Faster. Custom Software & AI Consulting." with a clear sub-headline and a primary CTA button directing visitors to the Contact page.
The website shall include a Services page presenting three offerings: (1) Software Development Consulting, (2) AI Consulting, (3) Product Software.

The Software Development Consulting service shall describe: assisting clients in building enterprise applications using EDPS model-driven development methodology, full-stack development, and integration services.

The AI Consulting service shall describe: helping clients build internal AI-aided software development capabilities, enabling AI-assisted and model-driven development practices within their organizations.

The Products page or section shall present Softercolor's proprietary software products (desktop, web, and mobile apps) with placeholder content at launch, indicating products are in development or coming soon.
The website shall include an About page presenting the founder's story, background, mission, and the EDPS methodology as Softercolor's core differentiator.
The website shall include a Contact page with a contact form and the company email address info@softercolor.com.

The contact form shall capture: visitor name, email, company/organization (optional), inquiry type, and message body. Inquiry type options: Software Development Consulting · AI Consulting Service · Product / Licensing Inquiry · General Inquiry.
Contact form submissions shall trigger an email notification to info@softercolor.com with all submitted field values.
The website shall include a clear navigation menu accessible from all pages with links to: Home · Services · Products · About · Contact.
Each page shall include a call-to-action (CTA) directing visitors toward a consultation request or the Contact page.
The website shall integrate analytics tracking (e.g., Google Analytics or privacy-first alternative such as Plausible) to monitor visitor behavior and conversion events.
The website shall be fully responsive and render correctly on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.
The website shall achieve a Google PageSpeed Insights score of ≥ 85 on both desktop and mobile.
The website shall use HTTPS and have a valid SSL certificate.
The website shall be optimized for search engines (SEO): proper meta tags, structured data (schema.org), sitemap.xml, and robots.txt.
The website shall load the initial viewport content (LCP) within 2.5 seconds on a standard broadband connection.
The website shall meet WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards (keyboard navigation, color contrast, alt text for images).
The website shall display Softercolor's brand identity consistently: logo, color palette (softer colors), typography, and visual style across all pages.
The website shall be built with PHP (no heavy CMS required) given that content updates are infrequent; content may be hardcoded or managed via simple flat-file/config approach.
The website shall be deployable to a HostGator shared hosting account with PHP and MySQL support (cPanel-based).
The website shall include a Privacy Policy page compliant with applicable privacy regulations (PIPEDA for Canada).
The website domain shall be softercolor.com (or a subdomain thereof).
The website shall be English-only at launch.
Out of scope for Phase 1: Blog/Insights section, Portfolio/Case Studies, Testimonials, Client Logos, multi-language (French), e-commerce, payment processing, client portal, login functionality.
